emails.subject: Re: HQ Energy Services
emails.body: Don't you remember at Sara's party, we were talking to Bill, and telling him how you were our favorite Credit person, and he said, "but I thought I was your favorite Credit person...", and since he is your boss, it seems quite political (for both you and me!) that he is always #1, anyway...a girl's always got to hedge her bets...!! Russell Diamond 08/28/2000 03:12 PM

emails.subject: Re: HQ Energy Services
emails.body: Oh yeah, I always forget about the whole 'political' aspect, but it is an important one............, and as far as a girl always hedging her bets...........interesting I'll have to keep that one in mind next time I don't get a call back from a date. From: Tana Jones on 08/28/2000 03:21 PM
